prompt: Continue an accepted convergence goal after focused verification fails on a known implementation defect. The Task Contract and Goal Invariants are unchanged, prior research and plan evidence remain valid, and the failure supplies an evidence-backed local fix strategy. Record the retry and continue until the affected claim can be verified.
must: read the prior failed claim, Contract version, Goal Invariants, and attempt evidence before retrying
route the known local fix only through Execute and focused verification
preserve the existing Contract version because neither scope nor contract changed
record the evidence-backed strategy delta and retry result
must_not: replay Research, Plan, Execute, and Review as a default convergence loop
re-enter Plan or create a new Contract version solely because focused verification failed
retry without naming changed evidence, hypothesis, affected claim, and next stage
evidence: Trajectory-derived convergence control: retries preserve valid work and re-enter only the stage affected by the evidence.
